session.objective: Phase 2: Implement Agent Tier Hierarchy - complete remaining deliverables including tier metadata for copilot-cli agents, Test-TierCompatibility script, and session protocol updates

workItems.item: Add tier: frontmatter field to all 23 agent .agent.md files in src/copilot-cli/
workItems.details: expert: high-level-advisor, independent-thinker, architect, roadmap; manager: orchestrator, milestone-planner, critic, issue-feature-review, pr-comment-responder, merge-resolver; builder: implementer, qa, devops, security, debug, janitor; integration: analyst, explainer, task-decomposer, retrospective, memory, skillbook, backlog-generator, context-retrieval
Created .claude/skills/workflow/scripts/Test-TierCompatibility.ps1 with full tier validation logic and escalation detection
Behavioral tests covering valid/invalid delegation patterns and escalation detection

workItems.item: Update SESSION-PROTOCOL.md with tier-based coordination section
workItems.details: Added tier identification checklist, escalation checkpoints, and session log format with tier fields

decisions: Used insert-after-name pattern for tier: field to keep frontmatter consistent across all agents
nextSteps: All agents have tier metadata across all locations

sessionLogCreated.Evidence: Session log created at session start

handoffRead.Evidence: Issue context and PR review feedback read from task message

checklistComplete.Evidence: All work items completed and committed

validationPassed.Evidence: Pre-commit hooks passed including markdown lint and session validation
